glossary.summary: Closed vocabulary for `content/*.xml` files in faion-network methodologies. Authors must pick from this list; new tags require a glossary update.

tag.name: text
tag.purpose: Root element for one methodology text file.
tag.attributes: id (unique within methodology), title (short human label)

tag.name: summary
tag.purpose: One-sentence description of the file's contribution.

tag.name: section
tag.purpose: Logical grouping of related rules/examples within a text.

tag.name: p
tag.purpose: Plain explanatory paragraph. Use sparingly — prefer typed elements.

tag.name: rule
tag.purpose: A concrete, testable directive the agent must follow.

tag.name: statement
tag.purpose: The rule itself, in imperative voice.

tag.name: rationale
tag.purpose: Why the rule exists; empirical anchor or mechanism.

tag.name: example
tag.purpose: A concrete worked example demonstrating a rule.

tag.name: code
tag.purpose: Verbatim source code, wrapped in CDATA.

tag.name: note
tag.purpose: Short commentary attached to an example.

tag.name: reference
tag.purpose: Hard dependency on a file the agent may load (template, script, schema).

tag.name: list
tag.purpose: Bullet list of short items where role is uniform.
